blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
